item.title: The end game is in sight
item.description: https://www.news5cleveland.com/news/politics/ohio-politics/ohio-gop-threatens-to-cut-school-funding-calling-spending-unsustainable They question how public schools are spending the money. They support sending tax payer dollars to private schools. Why do they never question how the private schools are spending the money? You know why. Support your public schools. Don't vote Republican.

item.title: Thank you, imgur. Update to my request
item.description:
An update to my post https://imgur.com/gallery/NTkWMCJ @chapsflanders @cosplaykeke7 @alasdair @LiberalOldWoman Thank you so much for all your effort. I can't tell you how much I appreciate yall coming through. My whole family are going to be absolutely touched by this Also, thanks to @RattiesAreLife and @Satan for tagging me on the posts
@alasdair went out yesterday, but arlington was closed. Appreciate the second effort today
Someone got the wreath out of the snow, which i am very grateful for.
I originally made this request a while back, but this was the first real snow DC has had since my pops was laid to rest Thank you, imgur community.
item.dc:creator: Fenwaywookie

item.title: Then there’s this moron
item.description:
https://futurism.com/tax-investor-begs-help-fire TL;DR: Rich real estate investor bro complaining about high taxes to pay for lifesaving services offers to pay to cut in line. In a Wednesday tweet, Wasserman begged for help, asking if anybody had "access to private firefighters to protect our home in Pacific Palisades." "Need to act fast here," he wrote. "All neighbors houses burning. Will pay any amount. Thank you." But Wasserman didn't get much pity online. Instead, he was swiftly mocked for asking for special treatment while thousands of Californians had no choice but to leave their homes behind — especially because, netizens were quick to point, a mere three months ago, Wasserman begged president-elect Donald Trump to cut taxes. "Homeboy went from 'Real estate ballers don’t pay taxes' to 'will pay anything for private firefighters' real quick," one user wrote in a Threads post. The ensuing media coverage appears to have been too much for Wasserman, who promptly deactivated his X account. That's despite praising X owner Elon Musk for purportedly bringing "free speech" to the platform just days earlier and calling the Tesla Cybertruck — which he appears to own himself — "one badass machine."
https://www.geltventurepartners.com/team-members/keith-wasserman Just in case the slimy fuck tries to scrub his profile.
item.dc:creator: beneaththewillowtree

item.title: Our 'Jack' did this to me recently..
item.description: We 'rescued' Jack when he was about 9 months old. He lived with us 'til he was 16. "Everyone loves Jack" was a thing. With kids, other dogs, he was so chill. Even as we knew the inevitable was happening, we took him to the vets for the final visit, and even though he was in final shutdown, he wagged his tail at a couple of dogs there and never stopped 'smiling'. Dog people will know what I mean by that. He left a huge emotional hole in our household... This was about four years ago now, but it's funny how finding an old image rekindles thoughts. I'd hug that chunky bag of silky fur for days, if I could...
item.dc:creator: mikenco

item.title: A daily picture of Peanut the dog - Day 1595
item.description: Going outside today all the old girl wanted to do was eat snow.
item.dc:creator: dennyson

item.title: If Toxic People Told the Truth
item.description: Mined off Instagram. This video may be triggering to some. Thank you to everyone who contributed and shared their experiences and insights. I hope everyone can continue healing and helping one another. As many have vouched for, going no-contact can be necessary, especially if communication has failed. Nobody, regardless of blood ties, is worth your well-being. I have to focus for the next while. That may require uninstalling this app. Be kind to one another.
item.dc:creator: unwaver

item.dc:creator: Laddiusmaximus

item.title: Today is a special day for me! Here is my collection of memes.
item.description:
Today is the release of the expansion to our RPG that we worked on for almost a full year. I am the lead developer. In celebration, I am sharing all the internet memes I collected and loved!
Hope you liked the collection as much as I did!
Some info about our game: The release of the first and major expansion to our RPG is today! (January the 9th) Took us whole year of work to make this expansion. Here is expansion page: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2982030/Svarogs_Dream__Return_of_the_Old_Gods_Expansion/ The game is set in the world of Slavic Mythology, and we tried our best to bring something new to the genre. Send us some love today, as this is a once-in-a-lifetime project for the team and all the people who worked with me on this game. Have a fantastic day! Ivan Ristic, Lead Developer.
item.dc:creator: SvarogsDream
